channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Canelo Alvarez changes course, drops Paul fight to sign big deal with Riyadh Season
item.description: Canelo Alvarez has agreed to a four-fight deal with Riyadh Season, with the Mexican star leveraging a widely speculated bout with Jake Paul for a much bigger contract.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Warriors' Kerr, Lakers' Redick host basketball team from Pacific Palisades high school hurt by fire
item.description: Steve Kerr and JJ Redick jointly hosted some special guests when Warriors took on the Lakers in downtown Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: BREAKING: Junior Hockey League expansion team coming to Grand Junction 2025
item.description: Starting this fall, the action and excitement of the National Collegiate Development Conference, the highest level of the United States Premiere Hockey League, a Tier II junior hockey league, will be in Grand Junction at River City Sportplex.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Saint Mary’s falls at USF 65-64 in WCC basketball showdown
item.description: Saint Mary's suffered its first WCC loss of the season by failing to hold an 11-point second-half lead and losing 65-64 at USF, where the Dons are unbeaten this season.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Dylan Guenther scores game-winner in OT again
item.description: COLUMBUS (ABC4 Sports) - Dylan Guenther has proven to have a penchant for the dramatic. For the second straight game, Utah's leading scorer found the back of the net in the final minute of overtime to give UHC a 3-2 win over Columbus Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jimmy Butler joins the Warriors, says he has love for the Heat and is ready for another title shot
item.description: Moments before Jimmy Butler was handed a Golden State Warriors jersey for the first time, he made clear what his motivation is going forward. He wants his first championship.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bills' Josh Allen wins 1st career NFL MVP
item.description: Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen was named the Most Valuable Player of the 2024 NFL season during Thursday night's NFL Honors in New Orleans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Super Bowl champ Ed McCaffrey a 'big believer' in safe gun ownership, gives advice on responsible handling
item.description: Three-time Super Bowl champion Ed McCaffrey recently teamed up with Colt to spread awareness on safe gun ownership and shared his advice.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe make the Pro Football Hall of Fame
item.description: Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe have been voted into the Pro Football Hall of Fame in the smallest induction class in 20 years following offseason rule changes meant to make it harder to get inducted.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Baseball star Shohei Ohtani’s ex-interpreter is sentenced to nearly 5 years in sports betting case
item.description: SANTA ANA, Calif. (AP) — The former interpreter for baseball star Shohei Ohtani was sentenced Thursday to nearly five years in prison for bank and tax fraud after he stole nearly $17 million from the Los Angeles Dodgers player’s bank account.
item.dc:creator: AMY TAXIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz acquire guard KJ Martin at trade deadline
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a busy trade deadline for the Utah Jazz, but when all the dust settled, the Jazz are coming away with one new player and five draft picks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Daytona boss inspires students with his NASCAR journey
item.description: The "Super Bowl" of racing, the Daytona 500, will be the next biggest event in the world of sports, taking place February 16, 2025.
item.dc:creator: Davis Suppes, NewsNation

item.title: Sports reporter dies while in New Orleans for Super Bowl LIX
item.description: Adan Manzano died on Wednesday in New Orleans while on assignment to cover the Super Bowl for both Telemundo Kansas City and Tico Sports.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Josh Allen wins AP NFL Most Valuable Player award
item.description: Josh Allen edged two-time winner Lamar Jackson for the AP NFL Most Valuable Player award in the closest race since Matt Ryan beat out Tom Brady in 2016.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Plateau Valley’s Bevan Brothers Commit to Colorado Mesa
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Two brothers from Plateau Valley High School are taking the next step in their athletic careers, and they won’t have to go far to do it. Jackson and Heston Bevan, both standout multi-sport athletes, are staying close to home.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Warriors to trade for Miami's Jimmy Butler: ESPN
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors are finalizing a blockbuster trade for Miami Heat star Jimmy Butler, ESPN reported Wednesday. Butler, 35, also agreed to an extension with the Warriors that will keep him with the team through the 2026-27 season, ESPN said.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Local football player overcomes hardships, signs to play Division I football
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — Mental toughness isn't something you're born with; it's a learned skill. One that Calvary Christian senior Nelson Sparrow Jr. has already mastered. "It feels great," he said. "I dreamt of this. I worked hard for this every single day of my life.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Big Game Bound: Pros detail offensive matchup battle in Super Bowl LIX
item.description: When it comes to offense, both the Kansas City Chiefs and Philadelphia Eagles are firing on all cylinders heading into Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, NewsNation

item.title: Rams headed Down Under for NFL's 1st game in Australia
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) — The Los Angeles Rams are set to make NFL history Down Under next year. The squad announced Wednesday that they're headed to Melbourne, Australia, in 2026 to play the league's first regular season game in the country.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Jeremiah Trotter Jr. continues legacy of Eagles Super Bowl linebackers
item.description: His dad, known as the "Ax Man" for his signature sack celebration, played eight seasons in Midnight Green and is a member of the team's Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, NewsNation

item.title: Two arrested in pro athlete burglaries case: New York prosecutors
item.description: Prosecutors alleged evidence, including phone records linking suspects to a theft near Cincinnati on Dec. 9.
item.dc:creator: Laura Ingle, NewsNation

item.title: Boys Basketball: Tri City Christian 49, Army Navy 37
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Great game on Monday night in Vista with Tri City Christian hosting Army Navy. All tied up at 21 at halftime, the Eagles pulled off and won 49-37. Lead by Caleb Williams who hit for 14. Army Navy was lead by Yanler Ramos, he also poured in 14.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: President Donald Trump to attend Super Bowl LIX
item.description: Many A-list stars are often seen at large sporting events, dawning their favorite team's gear and posting the experiences on social media. But hardly any can compare to the magnitude of the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Big 12 Conference unveils 2025 schedule, Utah and BYU to meet in October
item.description: It's a big day for college football fans as the Big 12 Conference released the full 2025 season schedule which includes the schedules for the Utah Utes and the BYU Cougars.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: The 2025 Super Bowl commercials already catching attention
item.description: Super Bowl Sunday isn't here yet, but some of the commercials set to air during the game have already been released.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Fans at Raptors game continue trend of booing US national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Fans at a Toronto Raptors game continued an emerging trend Sunday of booing the American national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada.
item.dc:creator: IAN HARRISON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chase Elliott wins Clash at Bowman Gray and sets sights on following it with Daytona 500 victory
item.description: NASCAR returned to its roots with a fight-free preseason exhibition at Bowman Gray Stadium and a popular victory with Chase Elliott winning The Clash on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Iowa honors Caitlin Clark by retiring her number and hanging it in the rafters
item.description: Clark returned to Iowa’s Carver-Hawkeye Arena on Sunday to have her number 22 retired in a ceremony after the Hawkeyes’ 76-67 win over No. 4 USC, one season after she completed her historic college career.
item.dc:creator: JOHN BOHNENKAMP, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Drew Brees serves up pickleball to beloved New Orleans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS - Drew Brees had his fair share of fun in New Orleans, taking the Saints to football heaven. Now. the future Hall of Famers found a second line of work, quarterbacking one of the fastest growing sports in America. "Look. I'm a sports junkie, right? I love ping pong. I love tennis.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9

item.title: South Carolina retires jersey number of three-time WNBA MVP A’ja Wilson
item.description: Three-time WNBA MVP A’ja Wilson's South Carolina No. 22 jersey was hung in the rafters Sunday at Colonial Life Arena, her college home court that already features a statue of the program’s all-time leading scorer outside the main entrance.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bulls beat the Raptors 122-106 to end Toronto's season-best winning streak at 5
item.description: Coby White scored 25 points, Nikola Vucevic had 21 points and 12 rebounds and the Chicago Bulls beat the Raptors 122-106 on Friday night to end Toronto’s season-best winning streak at five.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Where to watch Super Bowl LIX in San Diego
item.description: Football fans who want to participate in the excitement of Super Bowl LIX without traveling to New Orleans or watching from their living room can watch the big game at several venues in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Padres FanFest returns to Petco Park: what to know before you go
item.description: It's that time of year again: Padres FanFest is back and is expected to be bigger than ever, according to a spokesperson with the San Diego Padres.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Rowdies Forrest Lasso returns to field after season-ending injury
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) - The Tampa Bay Rowdies returned to the field this week for preseason and so did veteran defender Forrest Lasso. After scoring two goals May 18, 2024, Lasso was named Player of the Week for his performance.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC
